creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-07-19 14:28:51 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-fonts            Makefile 
  Added files:
    x11-fonts/gnu-unifont-ttf Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  GNU Unifont is a free bitmap font that covers
  the Unicode Basic Multilingual Plane (BMP),
  using an intermediate bitmapped font format.
  
  This is converted to TrueType.
  
  Auther: Paul Hardy <unifoundry@unifoundry.com>
  WWW: http://unifoundry.com/unifont.html
  
  PR:             ports/125308
  Submitted by:   nrg milk <bsdports at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.101     +1 -0      ports/x11-fonts/Makefile
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/x11-fonts/gnu-unifont-ttf/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/x11-fonts/gnu-unifont-ttf/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/x11-fonts/gnu-unifont-ttf/pkg-descr (new)
